holdings.infoBox: FDEV is an equity ETF with a total of 222 individual holdings. The top holdings are Shell stock at 1.72%, AstraZeneca at 1.48%, Roche Holding AG at 1.44%, Novartis AG at 1.43%, and Endesa at 1.39%.

overview.description: The Fidelity International Multifactor ETF (FDEV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Fidelity International Multifactor index. The fund tracks a multi-factored index of developed ex-US companies. FDEV was launched on Feb 26, 2019 and is issued by Fidelity.
